mapper.sql: select p.post_id, p.user_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_image, p.is_anonymous, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.report_count, p.audit_status, p.audit_reason, p.ai_category, p.ai_audit_score, p.is_top, p.is_hot, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time from cw_post p

select p.post_id, p.user_id, p.category_id, p.title, p.content, p.cover_image, p.is_anonymous, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.report_count, p.audit_status, p.audit_reason, p.ai_category, p.ai_audit_score, p.is_top, p.is_hot, p.status, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, c.category_name from cw_post p left join cw_category c on c.category_id = p.category_id
mapper.insert:
insert into cw_post
user_id, category_id, title, content, cover_image, is_anonymous, audit_status, ai_category, ai_audit_score, create_by, create_time
#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{isAnonymous}, #{auditStatus}, #{aiCategory}, #{aiAuditScore}, #{createBy}, sysdate()
mapper.update: update cw_post set audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_reason = #{auditReason}, update_time = sysdate() where post_id = #{postId}
update cw_post set status = '1', update_time = sysdate() where post_id = #{postId}

update cw_post set status = '1', update_time = sysdate() where post_id in
#{postId}
update cw_post set view_count = view_count + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
update cw_post set like_count = (select count(1) from cw_like where target_type = '0' and target_id = #{postId} and status = '0') where post_id = #{postId}
update cw_post set comment_count = (select count(1) from cw_comment where post_id = #{postId} and status = '0' and audit_status = '1') where post_id = #{postId}
update cw_post set like_count = like_count + #{delta} where post_id = #{postId}
update cw_post set comment_count = comment_count + #{delta} where post_id = #{postId}
update cw_post set report_count = report_count + 1 where post_id = #{postId}
